name: forge-golden-retrieval-real-v1
description: Curated golden retrieval set for the HONEST real-corpus eval (HARD-04). Each case pairs a query with the repo-relative path(s) of the source file a correct hybrid retrieval must surface, graded against the REAL Forge monorepo corpus produced by forge_eval.real_corpus.build_repo_corpus (not the synthetic SAMPLE_CORPUS). Queries were authored to PARAPHRASE what a file does (semantic) or to name a distinctive symbol (identifier / exact-match) or to reward the canonical source over competing test/doc chunks (cross-file) — deliberately NOT quoting the file verbatim, so a perfect 1.000 would be a red flag, not a pass. metadata.gains carries optional graded relevance.
